reference: Hello, sir. I am forty-one years old and male. When I was seventeen years of age, in the morning, I felt blurring in my vision, the sound was not normal, I had a headache, and I felt light sensations in my right hand. This has happened about ten times until now. Later, I came to know that it happens due to hypertension. Some say it is because of hypoglycemia. Now I am taking blood pressure tablets as well as my medication of ten milligrams daily. Please suggest the actual cause for it and the best treatment.
text: Hello sir, I am forty-one years old in the male. When I was seventeen years of age in the morning, I felt blurring in my vision. The sound was not normal. I had a headache, and I felt light sensations in my right hand. This has happened about ten times until now. Later, I came to know that it happened due to hypertension. Some say it is because of hypoglycemia. Now I am taking blood pressure tablets as well as my medication of ten more grams daily. Please suggest the actual cause for it and the best treatment.
